title: Tangy Toasted Mexican Casabe Tacos
description: A briny and aerated Mexican dish featuring toasted casabe, spherified flavors, and a low-carb friendly twist, served in a traditional molcajete vessel, evoking nostalgic feelings of Mexican cuisine.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit to toast the casabe.
Mix the lime juice, olive oil, and sodium alginate in a bowl to create the spherification bath.
Submerge the toasted casabe in the spherification bath for 30 seconds to create the aerated texture.
Grill the chicken breast until it reaches an internal temperature of 165 degrees Fahrenheit.
Slice the grilled chicken breast into thin strips.
Assemble the tacos by placing the chicken strips onto the toasted casabe.
Sprinkle the chopped cilantro and salt over the chicken.
Serve the tacos in a traditional molcajete vessel.
Drizzle the remaining spherification bath over the tacos.
Garnish with additional cilantro if desired.
